author: TonyMontana
content:
**Welcome To Module 8: Building A Bulletproof Trading System**

In this module we will go over EVERYTHING Strategy.

We cover multiple different setups you can choose from: PM high/low, Gap, Opening Drive, Inside Bar & more...

We cover how to journal your trades, backtest your trades and EXACTLY how to create a profitable playbook system.

**Workshop 8 Content:** 👇

Lesson 1 - **Trading Setups**

Lesson 2 - **How To Create A Profitable Playbook**

Lesson 3 - **How To Backtest Trades**

Lesson 4 - **How To Journal/Track Trading Statistics**

**Watch Module 8 Here:** 👇
https://whop.com/scarface-trades/the-accelerator-U4q53fe1xXqoEr/app/

@everyone
